About Us

K B Enterprises - All Safety Services

K B Enterprises is a provider of fire protection solutions, specializing in the design, supply, installation and maintenance of fire safety equipment.

Our goal is to be a trusted partner in fire safety, ensuring that our clients are always prepared and protected from fire risks.

K B Enterprises stands for “Protecting Lives, Safeguarding Properties — Your Trusted Fire Safety Partner.”

For Corporate Clients

Compliance-Ready. Well Documented. Professionally Executed.

A cleaner, more premium section designed to appeal to facility managers, admin teams, builders, housing committees and corporate safety teams.

Safety Infrastructure

Alarms, call points, hose reels, hydrants and extinguishers.

Emergency Preparedness

Training, mock drills and practical response awareness.

Audit & Maintenance

Regular checks, replacement, refilling and AMC support.
